name: Ferplast Dog Nail Cutter GO 5987
shortDescription: Keep your dog’s nails healthy and perfectly trimmed with the Ferplast GRO 5987 Dog Nail Cutter . This safe and easy-to-use grooming tool features a built-in limiting mechanism to prevent overcutting, ensuring each trim is precise and gentle. Its ergonomic, non-slip handle provides a comfortable grip for better control, making grooming stress-free for both you and your pet. Ideal for regular home grooming and maintaining paw health.
description: Designed with a safety closure to prevent accidental opening, they ensure safe storage and handling. The integrated limiting mechanism helps you trim nails with precision, avoiding overcutting. A sturdy plastic handle offers a comfortable, non-slip grip for better control. This is an essential grooming tool for maintaining your dog’s paw health at home.
